title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Bayer India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Bayer India
jsonLd.description:
Bayer India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Bayer India:
Bayer India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bayer India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
